Class 3 (solo execution) risk elevated — perspective acting without swarm consensus.", "recommended_fix": "Halt execution until Coordinator Agent is built and runs protocol alignment check. All CEO requests must flow through swarm consensus mechanism, not direct assignment to single perspective."}, {"severity": "medium", "file_or_area": "memory/atlas/identity.md", "issue": "Task creates self-referential loop: Security Auditor evaluating CEO who defines the Constitution that governs the Auditor. findings.issue: CEO's request for self-assessment bypasses documented swarm protocol in `packages/swarm/autonomous_run.py`. No Coordinator Agent exists to validate if this task complies with Level 0 laws before execution. Class 3 (solo execution) risk elevated — perspective acting without swarm consensus.
findings.recommended_fix: Halt execution until Coordinator Agent is built and runs protocol alignment check. All CEO requests must flow through swarm consensus mechanism, not direct assignment to single perspective.

findings.issue: Task creates self-referential loop: Security Auditor evaluating CEO who defines the Constitution that governs the Auditor. No independent arbiter exists if CEO violates own laws. Power concentration == single point of failure.
findings.recommended_fix: Introduce external ethics validator with immutable veto on Constitution violations. Current design allows CEO to waive any rule, including those protecting users from harm.
